description.en: Complete guide to automotive fasteners. Learn about engine bolts, chassis fasteners, body clips, and specialized fasteners used in vehicle manufacturing and repair.
description.zh: 汽车紧固件完整指南。了解发动机螺栓、底盘紧固件、车身卡扣和车辆制造和维修中使用的专用紧固件。
description.es: Guía completa de sujetadores automotrices. Aprenda sobre pernos de motor, sujetadores de chasis, clips de carrocería y sujetadores especializados.
description.ar: دليل شامل للمثبتات السيارات. تعلم عن براغي المحرك ومثبتات الهيكل والمشابك الخارجية والمتخصص.
description.fr: Guide complet des fixations automobiles. Apprenez les boulons de moteur, les fixations de châssis, les clips de carrosserie et les fixations spécialisées.
description.pt: Guia completo de fixadores automotivos. Aprenda sobre parafusos de motor, fixadores de chassi, clip de carroceria e fixadores especializados.
description.ru: Полное руководство по автомобильному крепежу. Узнайте о болтах двигателя, крепеже шасси, кузовных клипсах и специализированном крепеже.
description.ja: 自動車用ファスナーの完全ガイド。エンジンボルト、、シャシファスナー、ボディクリップ、專業的なファスナーについて学びます。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden für Kfz-Befestigungen. Erfahren Sie mehr über Motorbolzen, Fahrwerksbefestigungen, Karosserieclips.
description.hi: ऑटोमोटिव फास्टनर की पूर्ण गाइड। इंजन बोल्ट, चassis फास्टनर, बॉडी क्लिप, और वाहन निर्माण और मरम्मत में उपयोग की जाने वाली विशेष फास्टनर के बारे में जानें।

keywords: automotive fasteners, engine bolts, chassis fasteners, body clips, automotive clips, metric flange bolts

body.en:
Engine fasteners require special specifications:

Head Bolts/Studs:
- ARP or equivalent high-strength
- Torque-to-yield design
- Often one-time use

Main Bearing Caps:
- Bolts with precise torque specs
- Critical for engine integrity
- Follow manufacturer specs

Flywheel Bolts:
- Precision torqued in sequence
- Often thread locker required
- Critical for crank flange

Chassis fasteners critical for safety:

Suspension Bolts:
- Control arm bolts
- Strut mount bolts
- Often specified as one-time use

Brake Components:
- Caliper bolts
- Brake line fittings
- Critical for safety

Wheel Nuts/Lug Bolts:
- OEM or equivalent required
- Specific torque specs
- Wheel alignment after removal

Body fasteners include clips and specialized hardware:

Trim Clips:
- Push-type retainers
- Christmas tree clips
- Many different sizes/styles

Bolts:
- Metric flange bolts
- Speed nuts
- Captive nuts in body

Special Fasteners:
- Body side moldings
- Weatherstrip retainers
- Door hinge bolts
